title: Conjecture Telemetry Schema
description: Canonical metric names, descriptions, units, and attribute keys for Conjecture OTel instrumentation.

metrics.name: conjecture.database.replays_total
metrics.description: Number of test-case replays read from the example database.

metrics.name: conjecture.database.saves_total
metrics.description: Number of test cases saved to the example database.

activities.name: conjecture.test
activities.description: Root span for a single property-based test run.

activities.name: conjecture.generation
activities.description: Span wrapping the generation loop phase.

activities.name: conjecture.shrinking
activities.description: Span wrapping the shrink loop phase.

activities.name: conjecture.targeting
activities.description: Span wrapping the targeting / hill-climbing phase.
